name: Cauliflower and Lettuce Salad
directions: To crumble the bacon put it into a small ziplock bag and put in fridge after 10 minutes take it out and crush it still in bag, works well.
Put lettuce onion and cauliflower into large salad bowl put bacon on top.
Mix three ingredients for dressing.
Pour over salad when ready to eat.

similar.name: Creamy Cauliflower and Artichoke Salad with Parmesan Cheese

name: Fantastic Broccoli Salad
directions: Mix all salad ingredients in a large bowl.
Mix dressing ingredients in a small bowl and pour over salad, stirring well.
Chill for 2 to 4 hours.

name: Layered Salad
directions: Layer ingredients in order given.
Cover and chill overnight.
Mix just before serving.

name: Cauliflower Spinach Salad
directions: In a small bowl, combine the first five ingredients.
In a large salad bowl, combine the cauliflower, spinach, mushrooms and bacon.
Add dressing and toss to coat; serve immediately.

name: Mom's Cauliflower Salad
directions: Break cauliflower into bite-size flowerettes.
Wash and drain thoroughly.
Toss with remaining ingredients.

name: Layered Salad
directions: Combine lettuce, onion, cauliflower,tomato and peas in 9 x 13 dish.
Just before serving combine sour cream and ranch dressing.
Spread on top of vegetables and top with cheese.
Enjoy.

name: Crunchy Broccoli Salad
directions: Prepare and chop all salad ingredients and place in bowl.
In a separate bowl, make dressing.
Mix well.
Stir into salad.
Best if refridgerated for 1-2 hours before serving.

name: Cauliflower Salad
directions: Wash the cauliflower and place in a two quart saucepan.
Season and cover.
Heat the pan over medium flame for 5 minutes.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 15 minutes.
Cool.
Add the apple, celery and scallions to the cauliflower.
Add the salad dressing and chill before serving.

name: Cauliflower-n-Broccoli Salad
directions: Put broccoli, cauliflower,celery into bowl.
Mix together rest of ingredients, pour over veggies.
Chill at least 6 hours.

name: Broccoli-Cauliflower Salad
directions: Chop cauliflower, broccoli and red onion and toss together.
In another bowl mix Miracle Whip, sugar and red wine vinegar.
Pour over cauliflower, broccoli and red onion, add cheese and toss.

name: Cauliflower Salad
directions: Mix cauliflower, green onions, radishes, and sesame seeds.
In a separate bowl, combine sour cream, mayo, and ranch dressing.
Pour over cauliflower and mix until thoroughly combined.
Note: This makes a lot of dressing.
If you do not like your salads to be runny, buy two small heads of cauliflower or one really large one.
Or cut back on the sour cream, mayo, and ranch dressing.

name: Broccoli & Cauliflower Salad
directions: Cut Broccoli and Cauliflower up into bite size pieces.
Stir together sugar, vinegar and mayo.
Pour over the broccoli and cauliflower.
Toss in cheese and crumbled bacon.
Toss all together to mix together.
Refridgerate until ready to serve.

name: Cauliflower & Broccoli Salad
directions: Combine all ingredients.
If you choose to add raisins, do so just before serving.

name: Broccoli-Cauliflower Salad
directions: Mix all together and refrigerate overnight.

name: Broccoli Cauliflower Salad
directions: Cook bacon, crumble set aside.
In a medium salad bowl layer broccoli cauliflower eggs cheese and bacon.
Prepare dressing by whisking together the mayo sugar and vinegar.
Drizzle dressing over top and serve.

name: Creamy Cauliflower and Artichoke Salad with Parmesan Cheese
directions: Cook cauliflower in boiling water until crisp tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Cool.
Drain artichokes, reserving 2 tablespoons of the marinade.
Cut artichokes into bite size pieces.
In a large bowl, combine reserved artichoke marinade, mayonnaise and sour cream.
Mix well.
Blend in parmesan cheese.
Add cauliflower, artichokes and cherry tomato halves.
Toss lightly.
Chill several hours.

name: Tangy Broccoli and Cauliflower Salad
directions: Mix 1 cup Miracle Whip or Miracle Whip Light Dressing with 1/4 cup Kraft Catalina Dressing in a large bowl.
Add 3 cups each broccoli and cauliflower florets, 1/2 cup chopped red onion and the crumbled bacon.
Mix lightly.
Cover.
Refrigerate 1 hour or until ready to serve.

name: My Layered Salad
directions: I mix the Mayo, Sugar, milk and Vinegar until creamy- then I taste it-- if I need to add more sugar or vinegar then I add more.
My Salad dressing is kinda a taste thing- I taste till I like it!
I like vinegar so I usually tend to go heavy on the vinegar!

name: Broccoli and Cauliflower Salad
directions: Wash and cut up broccoli and cauliflower.
When well drained, cover with Kraft Buttermilk Ranch Dressing.
Refrigerate till cold.
Serve cold.

name: Cauliflower Salad
directions: Tear up the lettuce, and place on bottom of a large bowl.
Place cooled florets on top.
Cover with a thin layer of mayonnaise.
Put crumbled bacon on top of this layer.
Sprinkle sugar on top.
Put green onions on the next layer.
Sprinkle top with parmesan cheese.
Cover with a lid until ready to serve.
Toss everything together when ready to eat.

name: Broccoli Cauliflower Bacon Salad
directions: Place bacon in a large, deep skillet.
Cook over medium high heat until evenly brown.
Crumble and set aside.
In a medium sized salad bowl, layer in order the broccoli, cauliflower, cheese and bacon.
Prepare the dressing by whisking together the mayonnaise, sugar and vinegar.
Drizzle dressing over top and serve.

name: Cauliflower Salad
directions: Trim the cauliflower and separate it into flowerets.
Cover with boiling water and poach for 5 minutes.
Plunge immediately into cold water and drain thoroughly.
Place the cauliflower in a large bowl and add the onion, black and green olives, gherkins.
Combine the oil and vinegar, add salt and pepper to taste and blend well.
Pour the dressing over the salad, sprinkle with basil and toss until coated with dressing.
Chill for several hours, tossing occasionally.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.

similar.name: Marinated Cauliflower, Olive, and Arugula Salad

name: Cold Veggie Salad
directions: Cut veggies as needed for salad-size pieces and mix together.
Mix dressing ingrediens and pour over veggies.
Refrigerate 24 hours before serving.

name: Broccoli &Cauliflower Salad
directions: Mix mayonnaise, sugar and vinegar until blended well.
Combine broccoli, cauliflower, bacon, raisins and onion.
Pour mayonnaise dressing over broccoli mixture and stir to coat evenly.
Let stand for 30 minutes then serve.

name: Gregs Cauliflower Salad
directions: fry or microwave bacon to crisp crumble bacon into small pieces.
Shred or thinly chop lettuce (all this can be done while cooking bacon).
chop cauliflower using only tops not the stems (smaller is better).
Dice red onion.
add all ingredients and toss.
in a seperate bowl add half of mayo and sweetner mix well and add to mixture of greens.
keep tossing and add cheese (more is better,taste first).
taste for more mayo and add if needed (start with a little because too much can mess this up!).

name: Low Carb Bacon and Broccoli  Salad
directions: whisk together mayo, splenda, and vinegar in bowl,set aside.
put everything else in a bowl, add the dressing stir and serve.

name: Layered Cauliflower Salad
directions: In an oblong (13x10) dish, layer first lettuce then cauliflower.
Spread mayonnaise over cauliflower, then make a layer of chopped onion.
Spread bacon over the onion, then make a layer of Parmesan cheese.
Last, spread the sugar over the cheese.
Refrigerate overnight, then toss before serving.

name: Broccoli-cheese Salad
directions: Combine broccoli, cauliflower, cheese, onion, bacon bits, raisins, walnuts and apple in a large salad bowl.
Combine the mayonnaise and sugar in a small bowl; let sit for 15 minutes for the sugar to dissolve.
Add in the vinegar; stir well to combine.
Pour over the salad ingredients and toss to mix well.
Refrigerate for several hours before serving.

name: Shawn's Salad
directions: Layer salad ingredients 1/3 lettuce, 2 eggs, 1/3 onion, 1/3 cauliflower, 1/3 olives then 1/3 cheese.
Repeat until all ingredients used.  This is not necessary, but makes it easier to toss.
Mix dressing ingredients and toss with salad.

name: Broccoli-cauliflower Salad
directions: For the dressing: Mix the mayonnaise, sugar, oil, vinegar and salt and pepper together.
In a separate bowl, cut broccoli and cauliflower into bite size pieces.
Chop onion and add to broccoli mixture.
Pour dressing over broccoli mixture.
Toss gently.
Refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
Toss gently again and serve.

name: Broccoli Cauliflower Salad
directions: Vegetables can either be steamed or not.  I prefer steamed, which takes between 5-10 minutes.
Mix all of the dressing ingredients together.  Mix remaining ingredients together and toss in the dressing.

name: Mock " Potato/Cauliflower " Salad
directions: Break cauliflower into bite-size florets, and microwave 3 minutes til crisp-tender. Shock in cold water, changing frequently, until cool.  Blot with paper towels til completely dried.
Chop boiled eggs. Crumble bacon.  Add all vegetables, garlic, eggs, and bacon to large mixing bowl.
Stir together sour cream, mayonnaise, and buttermilk til smooth.  Pour over vegetable mixture and toss well.
Chill at least 2 hours.  Keeps 3-4 days in fridge.

name: Broccoli Cauliflower Salad
directions: Cut Broccoli and Cauliflower into florets (remove the stems and cut sections to bite size).
Combine the vegetables.
Drizzle with salad dressing.
Season to taste.
Refrigerate for an hour or more.
Note:  Measurements are to your taste.  We usually buy 1 bag of Broccoli and 1 head of Cauliflower and cut what we need.

name: Broccoli Salad
directions: After chopping the broccoli and cauliflower into bite-size florets combine all desired ingredients into a large bowl and toss with mayonnaise.
Add mayo until you reach the desired amount of "dressing" you like ;).
Enjoy!

name: Crunchy Floret Salad
directions: Whisk together the mayonnaise, sugar, cider vinegar, and salt in a small bowl.
Pour over veggies.
Add cheese and bacon, tossing to coat.
Serve chilled.

name: Lettuce Layer Salad
directions: Mix together mayonnaise and sugar.
Layer 1/2 of cauliflower florets, onion, bacon and lettuce.
Put half of the mayo mixture on layers.
Repeat layers.
Cover with remaining mayo mixture.
Cover with shredded cheese.
Chill overnight.
Toss just before serving.

name: Spinach and Roasted Cauliflower Salad
directions: Preheat oven to 425 degrees.
Combine cauliflower, 11/2 tbs. olive oil 1/4 tsp salt and pepperin a shallow roasting pan, tossing to coat well.
Roast uncovered 30-35 minutes, stirring twice.
Remove and allow to cool.
Meanwhile combine vinegar, mustard, and remaining 1/4 tsp salt in a small bowl.
Whisk in remaining 3 tbs of olive oil until well combined.
In a large bowl, combine cauliflower, onion and spinach.
Add vinegar mixture and toss gently.
Top with parmesan.

similar.name: Marinated Cauliflower, Olive, and Arugula Salad

name: Cauliflower and Herbs
directions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add Onions, celery seed & black pepper and Saute for 1-2 minutes.
Add Cauliflower and cook 1 minute.
Turn Heat to medium low.
Add Gin, cover and cook for 10 minutes.
Add spinach and stir until just wilted.
Stir in fresh herbs, cook about 30 seconds and remove to serving bowl.
Deglaze pan with vinegar and sprinkle vinegar over vegetables in the bowl.
Sprinkle with salt and fresh ground pepper, toss and serve.

name: Broccoli and Cauliflower Salad
directions: After rinsing well, combine chopped cauliflower and broccoli in large a bowl.  Toss in onion, cheese and bacon pieces.

In a separate bowl, mix together the mayo, sugar and red wine vinegar.  Coat the dry ingredients well with the mayo mixture.  Everything should be coated but not so much that the mixture becomes soupy.
All of the prep can be done ahead of time, but the mix is better when everything is crisp so don't toss together til close to time of serving.

name: Cauliflower and Pea Salad
directions: Break cauliflower into bite sized pieces and mix with peas and shredded cheese.
Sprinkle Ranch Dressing mix on top.
Refrigerate overnight.
Add mayonnaise one hour before serving.

name: Cauliflower Salad Bowl
directions: Sliced the cauliflower thin.  Drain and dice the pimentos.  Mix, mix, mix.  Refrigerate.
Better made the day before as the ingredients blend.

name: Cauliflower Broccoli Salad
directions: Cut cauliflower and broccoli into small pieces.  Add cheeses and onions.
In separate bowl, mix mayonnaise, sugar, seasonings and vinegar togehter; stir over vegetables.
Chill until ready to serve.  Stir in cooked and crumbled bacon at the last moment.

name: Broccoli and Cauliflower Tossed Salad
directions: Cut washed cauliflower,broccoli and cucumbers into bite size pieces add to large bowl.
In a small bowl mix together:
Salad dressing, oil, vinegar, sugar and seasonings.  Pour over vegetables at least 2 hours before serving.
Marinade by turning covered bowl.

name: Broccoli and Cauliflower Salad
directions: Toss veggies, cheese and bacon bits in bowl.
Mix dressing and mustard.
Pour over salad and toss to coat.
Refrigerate until ready to serve.
*To blanch veggies, plunge into boiling water briefly (2 minutes), then into cold water to stop the cooking process.).

name: Cauliflower Salad
directions: Mix all ingredients in a large bowl and serve chilled.

name: Broccoli Cauliflower Salad
directions: Cut up broccoli, cauliflower and onion and place in a large bowl; set aside.
In a small bowl combine miracle whip, sugar, vinegar and celery seed.
Pour mixture over broccoli and cauliflower; mix until coated.
Add sunflower seeds and mix.

name: Broccoli,cauliflower Salad
directions: Mix all the veggies together.
You can add the dressing at this time.
Add your cheese, bacon,sunflower seeds and raisins just before you serve the dish or atleast within an hour of serving it.
Mix all together.

name: Marinated Cauliflower, Olive, and Arugula Salad
directions: Whisk vinegar and mustard in small bowl; gradually whisk in oil. Season dressing generously with salt and pepper.
Combine cauliflower, olives, and celery in large bowl. Add 3/4 cup dressing; toss to coat.
Cover salad and remaining dressing separately; chill overnight.
Mix green onions and parsley into salad. Arrange arugula on platter; drizzle with remaining dressing.
Top arugula with cauliflower mixture. Sprinkle with pepper.

name: Marinated Vegetable Salad
directions: Chop broccoli, peppers and cauliflower into bite-sized chunks.
Mix broccoli, peppers, cauliflower, whole cherry tomatoes and baby carrots in a large bowl.
In a separate bowl, whisk ranch dressing, oil and vinegar until thoroughly mixed.
Pour dressing over veggies and toss until coated.
Chill for at least 30 minutes before serving.

similar.name: Marinated Cauliflower, Olive, and Arugula Salad

name: Raw Broccoli & Cauliflower Salad
directions: Chop broccoli and cauliflower, discarding most of the stem sections.
Mix broccoli, cauliflower, onion, apple, raisins, bacon bits, walnuts, and cheese in large bowl.
Combine mayo, sugar, and vinegar in medium bowl.
Mix together mayo mixture and broccoli mixture.
Cover and chill over night.  Serve cold.

name: Mike's Broccoli and Cauliflower Salad
directions: In a skillet fry bacon until crisp, drain on paper towels and set aside.
Cauliflower, broccoli and onion should be chopped into small pieces, and tossed together in a large bowl. (Think cole slaw texture).
In a small bowl combine mayo, sugar and vinegar. Stir to combine.
Pour dressing over veggies, and mix well.
Crumble bacon and add with cheese and mix again.
Serve cold.

I would estimate you would need about a pound to a pound-and-a-half each of the cauliflower and broccoli and about a half of an onion. Cheddar cheese in what they usually use, but feel free to try any bold flavor cheese.

name: Warm Cauliflower Salad
directions: Mince and mash garlic to a paste with kosher salt using a large heavy knife, then add anchovy and capers.  Use the back of your knife, mash the anchovy and capers into the salt/garlic mixture. Transfer mixture to a large bowl and add the lemon juice and pepper, then add oil.  Mix well to combine. (this can be done ahead of time).
Cook cauliflower in boiling salted water until crisp-tender, 4 to 5 minutes. Drain well in a colander, then toss hot cauliflower with dressing. Cool to warm, tossing occasionally.

name: Easy Broccoli and Cauliflower Salad
directions: Toss togeather: broccoli, cauliflower, sunflower seeds, onion, bacon and cheese. Set aside. Mix and chill dressing. **mix dressing 2 hours ahead of time. before serving, mix all togeather.

name: Broccoli Cauliflower Salad
directions: Blend together mayo, vinegar, and sugar and set aside.
Stir the rest of the ingredients into a large bowl.
Add the sauce you set aside and stir well.
Let set in fridge for a day or so to let flavors meld. Stir a couple times while it sits.

name: Awesome Broccoli/Cauliflower Salad
directions: Put all ingredients in a large bowl and mix thoroughly.

name: Bacon Cauliflower Lettuce Cup Salad
directions: Mix cauliflower pieces, mayo, parmesan, onion and garlic salt.  Cover and store in refridgerator unitl ready to serve.  Just before serving spoon salad onto lettuce cups and top with crumbled bacon.

name: Amish Broccoli Salad
directions: Combine chopped broccoli and cauliflower in large bowl.
In a separate bowl combine the mayonnaise, sour cream, sugar and salt to make a dressing.
Add the dressing to the broccoli/cauliflower mix, stirring to evenly coat the veggies.
Stir in the bacon and cheese, reserving a small amount to sprinkle on top of salad just before serving.
Refridgerate until serving.
